title: "Wireless and Wired Networks not working"

forum: Networking &amp; Wireless

### Post by Probs on 2010-03-13
I recently installed openvpn and things were working. But I got a weird screen after a few hours and on restart my wired and wireless connections are not working. Can someone help?

[B]cat /etc/network/interfaces
[/B]auto lo
iface lo inet loopback

**cat /etc/resolv.conf**
#Generated by NetworkManager

Is there anything missing? I tried both wired and wireless and both are not working. Usually if I ever have a problem with wireless, the wired always work!

***My /etc/network/interfaces is looking wrong. Can you please send me yours?***

I am using ubuntu 9.10 and the internet was working correctly until today! Please help

---

### Post by Iowan on 2010-03-14
*/etc/network/interfaces* looks fine for a Network Manager controlled machine - the */etc/resolv.conf* should probably have some nameservers... but if the machine didn't connect with DHCP Server, it may not have gotten them. I presume **ifconfig -a** shows no IP address.

---
